news.title: McDonald's CEO says consumer spending could be 'getting a little bit worse'
news.summary: Shares of McDonald's have fallen 10% over the last year. Concerns about the broader economy have hurt the company's share price.

news.title: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg set to join Trump on China visit next week
news.summary: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg is expected to join President Donald Trump on his visit to China next week, a source familiar with the planemaker's plans said.

news.title: OpenAI trial: Mother of Musk's children says he offered Altman a Tesla board seat
news.summary: Former OpenAI board member testified that Musk wanted the AI startup to join his EV company. Shivon Zilis, a former Open AI board member who has four children with Musk, testified.

news.title: Paul Tudor Jones says AI bull market has 'another year or two to run'
news.summary: The market may still be in the middle innings of an AI-driven rally. The billionaire hedge fund manager said the market was in the midst of an 'AI rally'

news.title: Used car prices fall for first time this year as gas prices spike, EV interest rises
news.summary: Cox Automotive reports affordability remains a key concern for buyers. This is driving increased demand for older vehicles as well as all-electric vehicles.

news.title: Kevin Warsh will be the richest Fed chair ever. Just how rich, he isn’t saying.
news.summary: The Fed chair nominee has filed 69 pages about his finances that mostly tell you what he won't tell you. The Senate is ready to confirm him anyway.

news.title: ‘The S&P 500 seems to be doing particularly well’: I’m 66. Is this a good time to invest $100,000 in the stock market?
news.summary: “I own my home and I have no debt,” she says. “I’ve never been in debt in my life.”

news.title: Fortinet’s stock rockets higher as earnings help dispel fears of AI disruption
news.summary: An “increasingly complex threat environment” is boosting demand for Fortinet’s cybersecurity offerings, the company says. Fortinet is a leading provider of security software and services.

news.title: The ‘SpaceX Mafia’ is here. Elon Musk’s big IPO could launch a constellation of new companies.
news.summary: SpaceX employees and alumni have an ‘insane network’ and will soon be able to tap a lot of cash, expanding the mini-SpaceXs orbiting the upcoming IPO.

news.title: The number of people getting unemployment checks just fell to a 2½-year low. Here’s why.
news.summary: A sluggish U.S. labor market appears to be coming out of its torpor. Is it getting easier to find a job?  Maybe.
